cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM=make -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=gcc -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=g++ -G "Unix Makefiles" -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=--coverage -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS=--coverage -S "/home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/DW_Decomp" -B "/home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/DW_Decomp/cmake-build-debug-coverage"
-- This project is a top-level one
set vector_sanity_check=1
CMAKE_MODULE_PATH="/home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/DW_Decomp"
